summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bank Accounts Management feature. Backend API: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI: All CRUD operations verified - Bank Accounts tab visible, Add/Edit/Delete dialogs work correctly, existing account 'PIR GRAIN AND PULSES LTD' displayed correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/bank-accounts returns list of bank accounts
Backend: POST /api/bank-accounts creates new bank account with all fields (accountName, bankName, currency, iban, bic, address)
Backend: PUT /api/bank-accounts/{id} updates bank account and persists changes
Backend: DELETE /api/bank-accounts/{id} removes bank account from database
Backend: Accountant role correctly blocked from /api/bank-accounts (403)
Frontend: Bank Accounts tab visible in Settings page between Vendors and Users
Frontend: Existing account 'PIR GRAIN AND PULSES LTD' at 'UNICREDIT BULBANK' displayed correctly
Frontend: Add Bank Account dialog opens with correct fields (Account Name, Bank Name, Currency dropdown, IBAN, BIC/SWIFT, Address textarea)
Frontend: Currency dropdown has options (USD, EUR, GBP, TRY, CHF, AED, UAH)
Frontend: Create new bank account - form submission works, account appears in table with 'Added' toast
Frontend: Edit bank account - dialog opens with existing values, save works, 'Updated' toast shown
Frontend: Delete bank account - removes from table, 'Deleted' toast shown
Frontend: Bank Accounts count updates correctly after CRUD operations
critical_code_review_comments: Bank Accounts API correctly uses require_roles('admin', 'user') to block accountant access
Frontend uses generic dialog pattern consistent with other Settings entities
data-testid attributes properly added for add, edit, delete buttons
seed_data_creation: None - used existing bank account 'PIR GRAIN AND PULSES LTD' in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Accounts Management feature fully tested and working. Backend CRUD API at /api/bank-accounts with proper role-based access (admin/user only, accountant blocked). Frontend Bank Accounts tab in Settings page with full CRUD functionality. Existing account: 'PIR GRAIN AND PULSES LTD' at 'UNICREDIT BULBANK'. Test credentials: salih.karagoz/salih123 (admin), pir.accounts/pir123 (accountant).

features_verified.bank_accounts_tab: Visible in Settings page between Vendors and Users tabs
features_verified.existing_data_display: PIR GRAIN AND PULSES LTD at UNICREDIT BULBANK with USD currency and IBAN displayed

add_dialog_fields.currency: Select dropdown with USD, EUR, GBP, TRY, CHF, AED, UAH options
add_dialog_fields.address: Textarea with placeholder 'Paste full address with contact details...'

crud_operations.create: Working - new account appears in table with toast notification
crud_operations.read: Working - accounts listed with all fields visible
crud_operations.update: Working - edit dialog pre-fills values, save persists changes
crud_operations.delete: Working - account removed from table with toast notification

role_based_access.admin: Full access to bank accounts CRUD
role_based_access.user: Full access to bank accounts CRUD
